title: Software Update - DFU -  Going to sleep mode during update
scenario: Firmware update (DFU) continues running or completes successfully when mobile phone enters sleep mode during the update process
steps: 1. Open Poly Studio Mobile app on the mobile phone.
2. Navigate to Home screen and ensure a Poly Bluetooth audio device is connected.
3. Go to Device Settings → [Device Name] → Firmware Update.
4. Initiate a firmware update (DFU) on the connected device.
5. While the firmware update is in progress, allow the mobile phone to enter sleep mode (e.g., press the Power button or wait for the screen timeout).
6. Wait for a few minutes while the phone remains in sleep mode.
7. Wake the phone (e.g., press the Power button or tap the screen).
8. Open the Poly Studio Mobile app and navigate to the Firmware Update screen.
expected: The firmware update should still be in progress or have completed successfully. The app should display the current update status (e.g., progress bar or completion message) without errors.
